violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (dough mixer, can opener, and rolling pins) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (prep tables in basement) have an accumulation of food residue and/or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025

The floors in basement including walk in coolers have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (basement) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024
Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC wash and sanitize knife holder. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024

Various food product was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024
Boxes and bags of food product were observed stored on the floor in the (walk in freezer). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024
Paper towel dispenser located at the basement hand sink area was not in good repair(broken/piece missing). New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024

The floor and wall junctures in the downstairs prep area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024

The floor and wall junctures in the downstairs prep area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2023
